provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, thin human woman in her 30s with a shaved head and a scavenger brand on her cheek, wearing a patchwork suit assembled from three different thermal undersuits stitched together with visible mismatched thread, a headlamp rigged from a dismantled ship light, heavy gloves made from cargo container strapping, boots from a dead Compact officer with the insignia scratched off, a pry bar and a cutting torch on her belt, she strips wrecks for a living
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero, symmetrical matching armor

judgment.explanation: Sable Reach outlaw. Salvaged, stolen, and improvised gear. Nothing matches, nothing is new, everything tells a survival story.
